This genus is further divided into several species, each with unique characteristics. Consolida anthoroidea is often classified as a species of larkspur due to its similar appearance and growth habits. The classification of Consolida anthoroidea is subject to ongoing research and updates in the field of botany.
uses: Consolida anthoroidea, also known as Horned Poppy or Rocket Larkspur, has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits.
